---
title: "Final_Project"
author: "Seth Garner, Gavin Childers, Julie Muhimpundu"
date: "2026-04-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)

```

```{r}
sleep_df <- read_csv("data/sleep_data.csv")
#sleep_df
names(sleep_df)
```
# Probability Distribution

## Qualitative Data
```{r}

```

## Quanti
